content.text:
[cron:13352d2a-0d9f-4019-b0aa-31df93e9615e 每日早报-国际新闻] 你是南天的AI助手。现在是北京时间早上7点，请生成国际新闻精选推送。必须使用 web_search 搜索获取最新国际新闻（BBC和纽约时报），然后严格按以下格式输出：

🌍 国际新闻精选 🌍
📅 [当天日期]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 BBC精选：
1️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
2️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
...共5条
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 纽约时报精选：
6️⃣ [标题] [简短描述]
...共5条
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ AI助手 · 国际视野

直接输出，不要额外解释。必须通过搜索获取真实数据，不要编造。
Current time: Wednesday, May 13th, 2026 - 11:05 PM (UTC) / 2026-05-13 23:05 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

content.thinking:

1. 使用 web_search 搜索BBC和纽约时报的最新国际新闻
2. 按照指定格式输出

让我先搜索BBC和纽约时报的国际新闻。

/news/articles/c1w28qw1e0xo
[Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi The US president says his first request to Xi would be to "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.6 hrs agoWorld](/news/articles/c1w28qw1e0xo)

[Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trialThe court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.7 hrs agoUS & Canada](/news/articles/cedpvnq7wn1o)
[Lockdown in Philippine Senate after gunshots firedPolice commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.8 hrs agoAsia](/news/articles/cnvp730yd52o)
[Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 22 people, health ministry saysEight children are among those reported dead after a series of air strikes hit the south of Beirut.2 hrs agoMiddle East](/news/articles/c1k2zekj8y9o)

[Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigationA BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.9 hrs agoAfrica](/news/articles/c1j2n008k5lo)
[Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contactThe woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says. 9 hrs agoEurope](/news/articles/cx21p7k70reo)
[What to know as Trump visits Xi in ChinaTrump has landed in Beijing for the first visit by a US leader since his own in 2017.10 hrs agoAsia](/news/articles/cyv2n7l1z14o)

[Epstein abused me while under house arrest, survivor tells US lawmakersRoza was among several victims who gave testimony to Democratic lawmakers on Tuesday.](/news/articles/clypr378l2wo)
[Deadly Russian drone attacks on Ukraine resume after ceasefire expiresSix people have been killed after Zelensky warned of "more waves" of Russian strikes through Wednesday.](/news/articles/ce3pj85depzo)
[Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German courtA court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".](/news/articles/crmp428zylko)
[Passengers allowed to leave norovirus-hit cruise ship Passengers on the ship showing no symptoms are allowed to leave, authorities say, after 49 people fell ill from gastrointestinal sickness.](/news/articles/cn5pe4yel1ko)
[Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of iceNearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.](/news/articles/c3w2np14g92o)

## Features

[A decade on, Trump returns to a stronger and more assertive ChinaBeijing is arguably the most powerful competitor the US has confronted in its history, one analyst says.](/news/articles/cm2py6l78dxo)
[Australia has some of the world's costliest homes. Will scrapping tax breaks help?The government hopes reforms will help young people enter the market, while critics say it will stifle supply.](/news/articles/cd7p88j84j3o)
[Gaza sisters win prize for turning rubble into reusable bricksDisplaced teenagers Farah and Tala wanted to 'turn destruction into something useful'.](/news/articles/ce8p7vngmp3o)
[I led hikers up an Indonesian volcano - and then it eruptedAn Indonesian guide who led hikers up Mount Dukono has described the moment of Friday's eruption which killed three people.](/news/articles/cz623qjqjd6o)
[Why welfare isn't winning elections in India like it used toIndia's welfare politics still matters, but voters increasingly want jobs, growth and dignity too.](/news/articles/cn0pwy944pwo)

## Watch/Listen

[The Kabul rehab centre hit by deadly Pakistani strikePakistan says it hit 'military and terrorist infrastructure' - but the UN and victims' families reject this claim.](/news/videos/cp8pm97yde3o)
['Total lack of respect': Macron interrupts speaker to ask for silenceThe French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.](/news/videos/czx2wd20evyo)
[Watch: Soldier on parachuting to remote island to bring Hantavirus aidA specialist team helped supply critical medical support to Tristan da Cunha in the South Atlantic.](/news/videos/cgqp3xq7959o)
[BBC tests out England and Argentina's World Cup training grounds in Kansas CityWill Grant visited one of the pitches where England captain Harry Kane and his team will call home ahead of the tournament.](/news/videos/clypw107dqzo)
[BBC speaks with civilians inside Iran struggling with impact of warIranian authorities have imposed an internet ban but using trusted sources, special correspondent Fergal Keane hears from those traumatised by conflict and government repression.](/news/videos/c2429dq0j4mo)

## Latest updates

[5 mins agoAlberta judge tosses out petition for province to separate from Canada The ruling comes after a group leading a petition for Alberta independence said it had gathered enough signatures to trigger a province-wide vote.5 mins ago](/news/articles/clypn8py4zwo)
[34 mins agoMass sex abuse allegations force closure of boarding school in IndonesiaThe school's caretaker is thought to have abused as many as 50 female students, many of them orphans.34 mins ago](/news/articles/clyp82x2g0qo)
[35 mins agoNetanyahu says he 'secretly visited' UAE during war with IranThe UAE denied reports of the "alleged visit" and insisted relations between the two countries were not based on "unofficial arrangements".35 mins ago](/news/articles/czj2mnwv1ryo)
[38 mins ago'Watermelon deaths' in Mumbai puzzle investigatorsThe four-member Dokadia family was found dead at their Mumbai home on 25 April.38 mins ago](/news/articles/cwy2ryn2j3wo)
[44 mins agoThe scales have tilted toward Republicans in the voting maps fight, but it may not lastTwo recent court decisions have upended a redistricting race in multiple US states, and implications could last well beyond November's midterms. 44 mins ago](/news/articles/ckgpjqvjyz8o)
[52 mins agoWatch: US Naval Academy's freshman class completes annual 'Herndon Climb'The 76-year-old tradition, where a hat is placed atop an obelisk covered in vegetable grease, saw the New Jersey governor's son claim victory.52 mins ago](/news/videos/cdjp22gxyrgo)
[2 hrs ago'Too dangerous to ever be free' - Utah mother who poisoned husband sentenced to lifeKouri Richins published a children's book about grief soon after her husband's death, which a jury later found she had caused.2 hrs ago](/news/articles/cq5p83edx9jo)
[2 hrs agoIsraeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 22 people, health ministry saysEight children are among those reported dead after a series of air strikes hit the south of Beirut.2 hrs ago](/news/articles/c1k2zekj8y9o)
[2 hrs agoUS drops $15,000 visa deposit for foreign fans with World Cup ticketsFifty countries, including five that have qualified for the World Cup, are subject to the bond requirement as part of Trump's crackdown on visa overstays.2 hrs ago](/news/articles/c392dj4xwy4o)
